tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Franz Beckenbauer was one of the greatest defenders in football history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the FIFA World Cup both as a player and a manager.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Miroslav Klose is the top scorer in FIFA World Cup history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He helped Germany win the 2014 FIFA World Cup.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Klose scored 16 goals in World Cup tournaments.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Thomas Müller is known for his intelligence and positioning on the field.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the 2014 FIFA World Cup with Germany.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Müller is famous for his 'Raumdeuter' playing style.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Manuel Neuer is considered one of the greatest goalkeepers of all time.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the 2014 FIFA World Cup with Germany.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Neuer revolutionized the role of the modern 'sweeper keeper'.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Toni Kroos is known for his passing accuracy and midfield control.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the 2014 FIFA World Cup and multiple Champions League titles.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Kroos played most of his career at Real Madrid.
